{{Quote|Ready to recon the area.|Imperial Scout Frigate Captain|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
'''Scouts''' were aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for naval operations and made up the bulk of its aquatic [[Imperial Maritime Division|navy]]. They could be upgraded to support additional armaments and armor.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}

[[File:ImperialScoutFrigate.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Light (top), standard (bottom) and advanced (muddle) Scout Frigates]]
